steps.title: Set up the ratio
steps.content:
For the ramp angle, tangent is opposite over adjacent. The height is $22.7$ inches and the horizontal distance is $x$, so the tangent value is
$$t=\frac{22.7}{x}$$

steps.title: Use the legal limit
steps.content:
The ramp must have tangent value at most $\frac{1}{12}$. Substitute the ratio from the figure.
$$\frac{22.7}{x}\leq\frac{1}{12}$$

steps.title: Find the least distance
steps.content:
Since $x>0$, multiply both sides by $12x$.
$$12(22.7)\leq x$$
$$272.4\leq x$$
The least possible value of $x$ is $272.4$.
The answer is 272.4.
